summary: Completed testing of ProfitPilot AI features and Import functionality. Backend APIs are working well (93.9% success rate) but frontend has critical loading issues preventing full UI testing.

minor_issues.issue: Template download works but test script has response parsing issue for binary data
minor_issues.impact: Test script issue only, API returns 200 and valid Excel file

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend consistently times out during page load - pages not rendering
critical_bugs.symptoms: Page load timeouts, blank screens, login form not submitting

critical_bugs.issue: Login form appears but submission fails/times out
critical_bugs.symptoms: Form fills correctly but no navigation after submit

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access /insights page due to frontend loading issues
Cannot access /import page due to frontend loading issues

success_percentage.frontend: 0% - Unable to test due to loading issues

critical_issues: Fix frontend loading timeouts - pages not rendering properly
Check frontend build configuration and runtime errors
